text.value: The Implementation Guide Resource id should be de.bih-cei.therapieziele-onkologie
An HTML fragment from the set [ip-statements.xhtml, ip-statements.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide

An HTML fragment from the set [cross-version-analysis.xhtml, cross-version-analysis-inline.xhtml, cross-version-analysis.xhtml, cross-version-analysis-inline.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide

An HTML fragment from the set [dependency-table.xhtml, dependency-table-short.xhtml, dependency-table-nontech.xhtml, dependency-table.xhtml, dependency-table-short.xhtml, dependency-table-nontech.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
An HTML fragment from the set [globals-table.xhtml, globals-table.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
Reference to experimental CodeSystem https://bih-cei.de/fhir/therapieziele-onkologie/CodeSystem/onko-therapy-intent|0.1.0
Das CodeSystem urn:iso:std:iso:3166 ist unbekannt
Das CodeSystem urn:iso:std:iso:3166 Version null ist unbekannt. Gültige Versionen: 1.0.1
Das CodeSystem urn:iso:std:iso:3166 ist unbekannt
Das CodeSystem urn:iso:std:iso:3166 Version null ist unbekannt. Gültige Versionen: 1.0.1
A definition for CodeSystem 'http://fhir.de/CodeSystem/bfarm/icd-10-gm' version '2026' could not be found, so the code cannot be validated. No versions of this code system are known

Der angegebene Code (http://fhir.de/CodeSystem/bfarm/icd-10-gm#C18.9) befindet sich nicht im ValueSet 'MII VS Diagnose ICD-10-GM' (https://www.medizininformatik-initiative.de/fhir/core/modul-diagnose/ValueSet/mii-vs-diagnose-icd10gm|2026.0.0), und es wird ein Code aus diesem ValueSet benötigt: Invalid criteria version: '2025"
Reference to experimental CodeSystem https://bih-cei.de/fhir/therapieziele-onkologie/CodeSystem/onko-therapy-intent|0.1.0
Reference to experimental CodeSystem https://bih-cei.de/fhir/therapieziele-onkologie/CodeSystem/onko-therapy-intent|0.1.0
Code kann ohne Verwendung des Servers nicht validiert werden
Das CodeSystem urn:iso:std:iso:3166 ist unbekannt
Das CodeSystem urn:iso:std:iso:3166 Version null ist unbekannt. Gültige Versionen: 1.0.1
Canonical URL 'http://fhir.org/packages/de.medizininformatikinitiative.kerndatensatz.onkologie/ImplementationGuide/de.medizininformatikinitiative.kerndatensatz.onkologie' kann nicht aufgelöst werden

The canonical URL http://fhir.org/packages/de.medizininformatikinitiative.kerndatensatz.onkologie/ImplementationGuide/de.medizininformatikinitiative.kerndatensatz.onkologie doesn't point to an actual ImplementationGuide resource
Alle Observations sollten einen Performer haben
Das CodeSystem urn:iso:std:iso:3166 ist unbekannt
Das CodeSystem urn:iso:std:iso:3166 Version null ist unbekannt. Gültige Versionen: 1.0.1
The extension http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-maxValueSet|5.3.0 is deprecated with the note: 'Use additionalBinding extension or element instead'
Reference to draft CodeSystem http://hl7.org/fhir/spdx-license|84728b7
Das CodeSystem urn:iso:std:iso:3166 ist unbekannt
Das CodeSystem urn:iso:std:iso:3166 Version null ist unbekannt. Gültige Versionen: 1.0.1

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-related'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '5.3.0', found versions: 4.0.1 (from hl7.fhir.r4.core#4.0.1), 5.1.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.1.0), 5.2.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.2.0), 5.3.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.3.0). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-related' to 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-related|5.3.0'
Der angegebene Wert ('de-DE') konnte in Ermangelung eines Terminologieservers nicht validiert werden.
Der angegebene Wert ('en-US') konnte in Ermangelung eines Terminologieservers nicht validiert werden.
Der angegebene Wert ('de-DE') konnte in Ermangelung eines Terminologieservers nicht validiert werden.
Der angegebene Wert ('en-US') konnte in Ermangelung eines Terminologieservers nicht validiert werden.

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-assertedDate'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '5.3.0', found versions: 4.0.1 (from hl7.fhir.r4.core#4.0.1), 5.1.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.1.0), 5.2.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.2.0), 5.3.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.3.0). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-assertedDate' to 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-assertedDate|5.3.0'

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-occurredFollowing'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '5.3.0', found versions: 4.0.1 (from hl7.fhir.r4.core#4.0.1), 5.1.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.1.0), 5.2.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.2.0), 5.3.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.3.0). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-occurredFollowing' to 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-occurredFollowing|5.3.0'

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/condition-predecessor'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '4.0.1', found versions: 4.0.1 (from hl7.fhir.r4.core#4.0.1), 5.1.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.1.0), 5.2.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.2.0), 5.3.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.3.0). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/condition-predecessor' to 'http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/condition-predecessor|4.0.1'

The extension http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/regex|5.3.0 is deprecated with the note: 'This was deprecated in favor of using a constraint on the element using FHIRPath, since constraints allow for the provision of a human readable message associated with the regex'

The discriminator type 'pattern' is deprecated in R5+. For future compatibility, you could consider using type=value with a pattern[x] instead (if this is not an inherited slicing)
The discriminator type 'pattern' is deprecated in R5+. For future compatibility, you could consider using type=value with a pattern[x] instead (if this is not an inherited slicing)

The definition for the element 'Condition.code.coding' binds to the value set 'https://www.medizininformatik-initiative.de/fhir/core/modul-diagnose/ValueSet/diagnoses-sct' which is experimental, but this structure is not labeled as experimental

The definition for the element 'Condition.code.coding' binds to the value set 'https://www.medizininformatik-initiative.de/fhir/core/modul-diagnose/ValueSet/mii-vs-diagnose-orphanet' which is experimental, but this structure is not labeled as experimental
The discriminator type 'pattern' is deprecated in R5+. For future compatibility, you could consider using type=value with a pattern[x] instead (if this is not an inherited slicing)

The definition for the element 'Condition.bodySite.coding' binds to the value set 'https://www.medizininformatik-initiative.de/fhir/core/modul-diagnose/ValueSet/mii-vs-diagnose-bodystructure-snomed' which is experimental, but this structure is not labeled as experimental
